title: Glycopeptide derivative compounds and uses thereof
abstract: Provided herein are methods and compositions for the treatment of Gram positive bacterial infections. The infection in some embodiments, is a pulmonary infection. The method for treating the bacterial infection, comprises in one embodiment, administering to a patient in need thereof, a composition comprising an effective amount of a compound a glycopeptide derivative of Formula (I) or (II), or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt of Formula (I) or (II).
